SSH allows password authentication — key-based auth recommended
hints: to fix: set PasswordAuthentication no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config

insights.message: SSH LoginGraceTime is 120s — recommend ≤60s to limit unauthenticated connection window
SSH X11Forwarding enabled — unnecessary on servers, increases attack surface
hints: to fix: set X11Forwarding no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config
note: only needed if users require GUI applications over SSH

insights.message: SSH AgentForwarding enabled — if this server is compromised, agent keys on your laptop can be stolen
hints: to fix: set AllowAgentForwarding no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config
note: use ssh -A explicitly when you need forwarding, rather than leaving it on globally

insights.message: SSH idle timeout not set — sessions stay open indefinitely (set ClientAliveInterval)
hints: note: this disconnects idle sessions after 300s × 3 = 15 minutes

insights.message: SSH weak MAC(s) enabled (sshd -T (effective config)): umac-64@openssh.com, hmac-sha1

insights.message: NOPASSWD sudo for: andrei
password never expires for human account(s): andrei
hints: to fix all: awk -F: '($3>=1000 && $3<65534){print $1}' /etc/passwd | xargs -I{} chage -M 90 {}
note: CIS benchmark recommends maximum password age ≤ 365 days

insights.message: slow boot unit: gpu-manager.service took 11.5s
hints: note: gpu-manager detects GPUs for PRIME switching — slow on Optimus laptops
to fix (if not using GPU switching): systemctl disable --now gpu-manager.service
note: safe to disable if you use NVIDIA-only mode or have one GPU
